release_notes: Replaces the choppy 5-frame font-size 'pop' animation introduced in 1.0.36 with a smooth background-color flash. The newest incoming Ready still renders at 15pt bold in the theme's darkest color and the second-most-recent at 12pt bold in the same color, but the arrival animation is now a 30-frame cubic-ease-out fade of the line's background from a theme highlight tint (light blue / mint / rose) down to the log's normal background, over 600ms at 50fps. Tk font sizes are integer-only, so a CSS-style scale animation showed up as discrete jumps no matter how many frames we used; background colors interpolate over the full hex spectrum and animate silky-smooth on both Windows and macOS Tk. Each theme dict gains a 'highlight' value; a third Tk text tag (recent1_flash) is layered on top of recent1 so the font/foreground stay static while only the background animates. No other code changes vs. 1.0.36.
